comment: Trust anchor for install_whisper_prebuilt.py: the reviewed release id plus the per-asset sha256 map for each prebuilt whisper-server bundle published by unslothai/whisper.cpp. To add a release: cut it in the fork, copy the manifest's per-asset sha256 into a new 'releases' entry, review the diff, and bump 'default_release_tag'. Until the first release is published and its digests are reviewed the assets map stays empty, so every asset fails closed (an unpinned override needs UNSLOTH_WHISPER_ALLOW_UNVERIFIED=1).
